headline: How Is Extra Space Storage's Stock Performance Compared to Other Real Estate Stocks?
summary: Although Extra Space Storage has outperformed relative to its peers over the past year, Wall Street analysts maintain a cautiously optimistic outlook about the stock’s prospects.
